text: Right, it's Tuesday the twelfth, just gone three in the afternoon, finishing up on level two. Steel frame for the eastern bay is fully erected and bolted, that's about a day ahead of schedule. The lads from Murphy's are on site, eight in total, they've put in a solid seven hours each. Concrete pour for the lift shaft has been pushed back though, the ready-mix supplier couldn't make the slot — re-booked for Thursday morning. One thing to flag, we've got water ingress on the southern wall, near where the temporary roof tarps were taped down last week. Doesn't look structural but I want a damp survey before we close the wall up. Materials-wise, we're three pallets short on the M16 anchor bolts, ordered more for Wednesday delivery. Weather's been kind, dry and about fifteen degrees, light westerly wind. Right, that's it from me.
